description_long: This object is a classic AK-47 style assault rifle, featuring a robust black metal receiver and barrel assembly paired with wooden furniture. The stock, handguard, and pistol grip are all rendered in a reddish-brown wood, providing a distinct contrast to the matte black metal components. The rifle has a long, cylindrical barrel with a front sight post and a slanted muzzle device at the tip. The magazine is curved and also appears to be made of wood or wood-textured material, matching the rest of the furniture. The receiver includes a visible trigger, safety lever, and magazine release, all typical of this rifle type. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on durability and function.
description: A classic AK-47 style rifle with black metal components and reddish-brown wooden stock, handguard, and magazine. The design is utilitarian and robust, with a curved magazine and slanted muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow barrel, front sight post, and the alignment of the wooden components.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the receiver and magazine curvature.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and handguard.
